one_time_description: Federal Funding of $15,996,782 received in 2020 vs $0 in prior year - likely related to Treaty Land Entitlement claim settlement (promissory notes fully repaid in September 2019 on settlement of Treaty Land Entitlement claim)
economic_notes: First Nation operates through multiple limited partnerships: MFNLP (community and mining operations, 100% owned), NLP (business development, 25% owned), MILP (dissolved April 2019, 50% owned). One-time payouts to members of $10,000 and $16,470 per eligible member declared. GICs of $3,319,411 held in trust for minor members.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Large one-time Federal Funding of $15,996,782 received (vs $0 prior year) likely related to Treaty Land Entitlement claim settlement - all ISC promissory notes ($616,136) repaid in September 2019 upon settlement. Matachewan First Nation Trust fully consolidated as subsidiary. Three GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis (MFNLP, NLP, MILP). MILP dissolved April 2019. COVID-19 note included. No schedule of remuneration provided. Accounts receivable and current liabilities not separately extractable from text provided - balance sheet details incomplete in the provided text. OSR calculation includes Federal Funding, interest, other revenue, share of GBE earnings, and OFNLP distribution as non-government-transfer items; provincial funding and ISC/Wabun/Federal treated as government transfers.
